calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Mr. Der stated that he filed a copy of an e-mail from Daniel with regard to his distribution going to someone else and that he could try to get a letter from Daniel but that he was difficult to contact/locate. In addition, Mr. Der stated that each of the two Trusts had their own set of expenses and that the Trustee had discretion to allocate the expenses. The Court signed the Ex Parte Order Re Notice to Daniel Beatty. The Court stated that further information in the Ex Parte application satisfies the Court with regard to the earlier payments made in Daniel's behalf. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review/modification of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Continued To Jul-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Continued To Jun-29-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (79 Castleton, Daly City)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

The sale was confirmed at $560,000.00. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond was waived.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Anderson.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Right-To-Sell Agrement
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Granted Per Written Order
